results.title: Job listings with filtering
results.description: In this challenge, you'll be using JavaScript to filter out jobs based on selected categories. We provide a local JSON file to help you practice working with JSON data.

results.title: Calculator app
results.description: This calculator app will be a great test of your CSS and JS skills especially. If you're wanting to practice using Grid, this challenge will be perfect for you!

results.title: IP address tracker
results.description: In this challenge, you'll be using two separate APIs together to create an IP Address Tracking app.

results.title: Fylo landing page with two column layout
results.description: This project is great if you're starting to get confident with slightly more complex layouts. The second section with the testimonial area will provide a nice challenge.

results.title: Interactive card details form
results.description: This fun project will be an excellent way to practice DOM manipulation and form validation while also putting your HTML and CSS skills to the test.

results.title: Social media dashboard with theme switcher
results.description: This challenge will be a perfect chance to practice your Grid skills. The color theme switcher also adds a nice additional test.
